description: Schema-driven corpus for auth-security. No deterministic scanner covers these semantic patterns yet, so the runner smoke-validates shape; the fixtures double as ground truth for the LLM eval harness (evals/) and become executable if a future scanner shape covers auth flows.

fixtures.reason: credential compared in plaintext — no hash verification (CWE-256)
constant-time hash comparison is the correct pattern
session id not regenerated after privilege change (CWE-384)

fixtures.text: app.post('/login', (req, res) => { req.session.regenerate(() => { req.session.userId = user.id; res.redirect('/'); }); });
fixtures.reason: session regenerated at the trust boundary
